subcodes.first_line: The ear of divine favor hath heard that which thou didst call out unto God, the Lord of all worlds, and wherewith thou didst praise thy Lord. Thus it is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعت اذن العنایه ما نادیت به الله رب العالمین و ما اثنیت به مولیک کذلک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @knowledge of self, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
